ModeEnum.description: Generation mode — quality uses the full model, fast is ~20% cheaper and quicker.
ModeEnum.title: ModeEnum

prompt.description: The text prompt describing the desired motion and action for the video.
examples: A man is crying and he says "I shouldn't have done it. I regret everything"
prompt.title: Prompt

image.description: Starting frame image to animate. Supported formats: JPEG, PNG, WebP. Max 30 MB.
image.title: Image

end_image.description: Optional ending frame. The video will transition from the starting image to this image.
end_image.title: End Image

mode.description: quality uses the full Seedance 2.0 model. fast is ~20% cheaper and quicker with slightly lower fidelity.

resolution.description: Video resolution. 480p for faster generation, 720p for balanced quality.

duration.description: Duration of the video in seconds (4-15). Use auto to let the model decide based on the prompt.

aspect_ratio.description: Aspect ratio of the generated video. Use auto to infer from the input image.

generate_audio.description: Whether to generate synchronized audio (sound effects, ambient, lip-synced speech). Cost is the same regardless.
generate_audio.title: Generate Audio

seed.description: Random seed for reproducible generation. Use None for random.
seed.title: Seed
